texto: At some point, our lips met and it was perhaps the most wonderful thing I'd ever experienced. And truly, I guess there wasn't just one kiss, but several. A polite frenzy. A mass migration of delicate wildebeest kisses. I remember them as one transcendent event, though.
explicacao: Citação de Dean Hale sobre temas ligados a amor. “At some point, our lips met and it was perhaps the most wonderful thing I'd ever experienced. And…” articula amor, humor, romance em registro de amor, com relevância para contextos como termino e romance.
